title: Cheap, Mechanical, and 11-Speed: Shimano Tiagra Is Back from the Dead
content:
The modernized 11-speed groupset brings 105-level ergonomics at a genuinely attainable price. Here’s what you get—and what got cut.

Read the full article at Cheap, Mechanical, and 11-Speed: Shimano Tiagra Is Back from the Dead on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
